_comment: PLACEHOLDER -- this is NOT a real Grafana dashboard JSON export. Import the dashboard from grafana.com at runtime instead of vendoring it here (see instructions below).

via_ui: Enter the dashboard ID: 19891 (or 19111 as an alternative).
via_api: -d @<(jq '{dashboard: ., overwrite: true, inputs: [{name: "DS_PROMETHEUS", type: "datasource", pluginId: "prometheus", value: "prometheus"}]}' /tmp/freeradius.json) \
import_instructions.vendoring: If you need to vendor the dashboard JSON in-repo (for air-gapped installs), download it with curl from the URL above and replace the contents of this file with the downloaded JSON.
